allow:
Bash(git -C "c:\\perso\\drone-simulator" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Viewer3D to use container dimensions instead of window dimensions

Update the Viewer3D class to base camera and renderer sizing on the
container element''s clientWidth and clientHeight rather than the full
window dimensions. This allows proper responsive sizing within a bounded
container.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); agent=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.agent.name // empty'); session=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_name // empty'); dir=$(basename "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd')"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); case "$agent" in explore) bg="\033[46m\033[30m";; bash) bg="\033[42m\033[30m";; plan) bg="\033[43m\033[30m";; code-discovery) bg="\033[45m\033[30m";; *) bg="\033[44m\033[37m";; esac; printf "${bg} ${agent:-main} \033[0m "; [ -n "$session" ] && printf "\033[2m[${session}]\033[0m "; printf "\033[2m${dir}\033[0m \033[2m${model}\033[0m"; if [ -n "$used" ]; then u=$(printf "%.0f" "$used"); [ "$u" -ge 80 ] && c="\033[31m" || { [ "$u" -ge 60 ] && c="\033[33m" || c="\033[32m"; }; printf " \033[2m${c}[${used}%%]\033[0m"; fi; echo
